button.label: RBLclass pane
button.screentip: Show or hide the RBLclass pane
button.supertip: Open the RBLclass pane: search the folder tree, jump to a folder (open button), and file the selected mail - single-click a folder to add it as a destination, double-click to file into it.

button.label: Refresh folders
button.supertip: Re-scan your PST stores so folders you created or renamed directly in Outlook show up in search. Run this after adding folders by hand.

button.label: Settings
button.supertip: Configure folder search, classify, sending guards and sent-item triage. Every change applies and persists immediately.

button.label: About
button.supertip: Version, author and technology information about RBLclass.
